Trust and transparency

Privacy information for your farm market account.

Learn how customer information, order details, notifications, and app preferences are used to support a secure shopping experience.

Policy

Privacy Policy

This page explains how The Harvest Place Ja handles customer information, orders, account activity, notifications, and security.

Information used

Account details, profile information, orders, favorites, support requests, reviews, subscriptions, and alerts may be used to process orders and improve the customer experience.

Orders and customer activity

Order details such as selected products, fulfillment type, delivery or pickup information, payment method, notes, and order status are used to complete and track customer purchases.

Supabase security

Authentication and database access are handled through Supabase. Sensitive protected data should remain behind Row Level Security policies and secure server-side rules.

Notifications

Order updates, ready-soon alerts, support replies, and account messages may be shown in-app or through browser notification permissions where supported.

Local storage and preferences

The web app may store simple preferences on the device, such as cart items, saved coupons, favorites, and display choices, to make the shopping experience faster.

Customer choices

Customers may sign out, manage browser permissions, clear local browser data, or contact support about account, order, or privacy-related questions.

Contact

Questions about your information?

Contact support if you need help with your account, orders, notifications, or privacy-related requests.

Contact support

This policy page should be reviewed and adjusted to match the final business process, data practices, and legal requirements before public launch.
